title: Side-by-side comparison of RGB and Classification modes on the same scene area
capture_instructions: Composite image showing the same viewport area (a road junction with buildings and trees) rendered in RGB on the left half and Classification on the right half, with a thin dividing line. Alternatively, capture two separate screenshots of identical camera position and arrange them side-by-side in the docs image. The scene should be zoomed in enough to show individual building/road/tree class boundaries clearly.
ui_state: Two captures: Color Mode = RGB (left), Color Mode = Classification (right), identical camera position and zoom level on both

annotations.label: Same scene area — switching mode reveals class boundaries
